positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define happy(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define sad(X0) := $false
for all groundings,
    whenever ~sad(X0) is true, set happy(X0) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for negative
% SZS output start Proof for negative
1. ! [X0] : (happy(X0) <=> ~sad(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ? [X0] : happy(X0) [input(axiom)]
3. ~! [X0] : sad(X0) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~~! [X0] : sad(X0) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ! [X0] : sad(X0) [flattening 4]
6. ! [X0] : (happy(X0) => ~sad(X0)) [unused predicate definition removal 1]
7. ! [X0] : (~sad(X0) | ~happy(X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
8. ? [X0] : happy(X0) => happy(sK0) [skolem symbol introduction]
9. happy(sK0) [skolemisation 2,8]
10. ~sad(X0) | ~happy(X0) [cnf transformation 7]
11. happy(sK0) [cnf transformation 9]
12. sad(X0) [cnf transformation 5]
13. ~happy(X0) [forward subsumption resolution 10,12]
14. $false [resolution 11,13]
% SZS output end Proof for negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
